LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS GLORIA E. DHEMING AND JOSE ROBERTO DHEMING'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANTS MOTION TO RECONSIDER APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER IS DENIED. THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO DO ANYTHING ON THIS CASE WHILE THE BANKRUPTCY MATTER IS PENDING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS GLORIA E. DHEMING AND JOSE ROBERTO DHEMING'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANTS MOTION TO RECONSIDER APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER IS DENIED. THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO DO ANYTHING ON THIS CASE WHILE THE BANKRUPTCY MATTER IS PENDING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Continued To Sep-20-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS GLORIA DHEMING, JOSE DHEMING'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to September 20, 2011 to be heard by Judge Giorgi. Plaintiff to provide a courtesy copy of its opposition to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar Jul-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF REDWOOD MORTGAGE INVESTORS VIII ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER TO COLLECT RENTS AND TAKE POSSESSION OF AND MAINTAIN PROPERTY.

APPEARANCES: Patric J. Kelly, Esq. of Adleson Hess & Kelly 408/341-0234 for pltf & moving party; Ekaterina Kashlinsky, Esq. of Law Offices of Kenneth Graham 925/932-0170 for deft & opposing party Gloria Dheming.

RULING: Discussed and the Court granted the motion. No opposition filed. Rents collected during course of TRO to be turned over. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
